message:
Initial commit: Astro 6 + Tailwind v4 + cobe globe

Minimal landing page for teamchong.net.

- Astro static output, deployed via Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
- Tailwind v4 (CSS-first config via @theme)
- cobe-rendered dotted orange globe with slow auto-rotation;
  mouse wheel adjusts rotation velocity (decays back to base speed)
- No interactive content beyond GitHub / LinkedIn links

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+node_modules
+dist
+.astro
+.wrangler
+.env
+.env.local
+.env.*.local
+.DS_Store
+*.log
+
+# Override global gitignore — lockfile must be committed for
+# reproducible builds on Cloudflare Workers Builds.
+!pnpm-lock.yaml

@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+{
+  "name": "teamchong-net",
+  "version": "0.1.0",
+  "private": true,
+  "type": "module",
+  "scripts": {
+    "dev": "astro dev",
+    "build": "astro build",
+    "preview": "astro preview",
+    "deploy": "astro build && wrangler deploy",
+    "astro": "astro"
+  },
+  "dependencies": {
+    "astro": "^6.0.0",
+    "cobe": "^2.0.1"
+  },
+  "devDependencies": {
+    "@tailwindcss/vite": "^4.0.0",
+    "tailwindcss": "^4.0.0",
+    "typescript": "^5.6.0",
+    "wrangler": "^4.0.0"
+  },
+  "packageManager": "pnpm@9.15.0"
+}
